questions.question: Given a pandas Series with a mix of date and non-date values, write a vectorized operation to extract the year from each date value and add it to the corresponding non-date value. Assume the date values are in the format 'yyyy-mm-dd'.

Suppose you have a pandas DataFrame with a column 'date' of datetime type and another column 'value' of numeric type. Write a code snippet to resample the 'value' column by the 'date' column with a frequency of 'M' (monthly) and calculate the mean of the resulting values.
A pandas Series contains a mix of strings and integers. Write a vectorized operation to replace all the strings with 'Unknown' and assign the result back to the original Series.
